meta.title: Classic 7 Photo Viewer — Brings back the classic Windows Photo Viewer
meta.description: Bring back the classic Windows Photo Viewer as an 'Open with' choice on Windows 11. Free, fast, and clutter-free — opens JPEG, PNG, HEIC, TIFF, RAW, and more.
meta.ogDescription: Bring back the classic Windows Photo Viewer as an 'Open with' choice on Windows 11. Free, fast, and clutter-free — opens JPEG, PNG, HEIC, TIFF, RAW, and more.
meta.jsonldDescription: Bring back the classic Windows Photo Viewer as an 'Open with' choice on Windows 11. Free, fast, and clutter-free — opens JPEG, PNG, HEIC, TIFF, RAW, and more.
app.name: Classic 7 Photo Viewer
hero.kicker: Brings back the classic Windows Photo Viewer
hero.lede: Classic 7 Photo Viewer brings back the fast, no-nonsense Windows Photo Viewer you remember — as a proper "Open with" choice on Windows 11.
cta.meta: No registry hacks, no ads — completely free
story.para: The classic viewer never left your PC; Windows just stopped letting you pick it. This free app puts it back, registering itself as a file-type handler that opens your images in the built-in Windows Photo Viewer — no registry edits, no fuss.
sec1.head: Simple and free
sec2.head: Opens what Windows already knows
note.text: Note: Classic 7 Photo Viewer is a lightweight launcher for the Windows Photo Viewer component included with Windows. It is not affiliated with, or endorsed by, Microsoft.
bv.name: Brilliante Photo Viewer
bv.head_html: Photos, the way they were meant to look
bv.body: View Ultra HDR, HEIC, motion photos, and iPhone ProRAW in vibrant, true-to-life colour — plus a brilliant glow-up for every ordinary photo.
sec1.b1: One-click Open Image, or right-click any photo → Open with → Classic 7 Photo Viewer
sec1.b2: Set it as your default for any image type in Settings → Default apps
sec1.b3: Fast, clean, distraction-free viewing — the way it used to be
sec2.b1: JPEG, PNG, GIF, BMP, TIFF, ICO
sec2.b3: HEIC/HEIF, WebP, AVIF (with the matching free Store codec)
sec2.b4: RAW camera files (with Microsoft's free Raw Image Extension)
